title: Support-Aware Neuro-Memory Reinforcement Learning under Support Shift: Reproducibility Artifact
description: Code, exact-step results, an application-inspired navigation case, fuzzy adaptive arbitration, support and cost metrics, compact and MiniGrid validation, and integrity audits for a soft-computing boundary analysis.

creators.name: Erkalkan, Ercan
creators.affiliation: Vocational School of Technical Sciences, Department of Electronics and Automation, Artificial Intelligence Operator Program, Marmara University
